tasks.build:linux: deno task css:build && deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --backend cef --output dist/pi-ui.AppImage src/main.ts
tasks.dev: deno run -A npm:concurrently -r "deno task css:watch" "deno desktop -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --backend cef --hmr src/main.ts --enable-blink-features=MiddleClickAutoscroll --disable-frame-rate-limit --disable-gpu-vsync"
tasks.server: deno run -A npm:concurrently -r "deno task css:watch" "deno run -A --unstable-no-legacy-abort --conditions browser --watch src/main.ts"
